title: SEC Partners CBN, EFCC To Track, Freeze Illicit Digital Wallets - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has announced a collaboration with the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) to track and freeze illicit digital wallets used for money laundering and other financial crimes. The Director-General of the Commission, Dr. Emomotimi Agama, disclosed this in Abuja while addressing participants
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has announced a collaboration with the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) to track and freeze illicit digital wallets used for money laundering and other financial crimes.
